title: SpaceX says AI rather than rockets is its biggest market
description: SpaceX built its reputation on rockets. Its S-1 filing, the regulatory document companies submit before going public, reveals where it expects to make most of its money: artificial intelligence for...
content: SpaceX built its reputation on rockets. Its S-1 filing, the regulatory document companies submit before going public, reveals where it expects to make most of its money: artificial intelligence for businesses, in a market it values at $22.7 trillion.... [1592 chars]

title: White House accuses China of industrial-scale theft of AI technology
description: The White House on Thursday accused China of stealing U.S. artificial intelligence labs' ​intellectual property on an industrial scale in a memo that threatens ‌to strain relations ahead of a summit between U.S. and Chinese leaders next month.

title: Delhi's Vision: AI Centres of Excellence to Propel Startups
description: The Delhi government, in partnership with the Centre, plans to establish two artificial intelligence centres of excellence to support 100 startups, train over 7,000 individuals, and create 1,000 jobs. These centres aim to enhance research and innovation, improve citizens' lives, and bolster digital governance.
content: The Delhi government is set to launch two artificial intelligence (AI) centres of excellence in collaboration with the Centre, aimed at supporting around 100 startups. IT Minister Pankaj Singh highlighted this initiative as a significant step toward ... [584 chars]

title: AI Takes The Stand: The New Frontier In White-Collar Evidence
description: Artificial intelligence has moved from the back office to the witness stand, becoming the foundation for expert testimony and forensic evidence in criminal trials.

title: Inside China, artificial intelligence is a snake eating its own tail
description: Opinion: AI researchers refer to this as “model collapse,” a phenomenon in which models trained on their own synthetic outputs degrade over successive generations.
content:
China’s greatest technological ambition and its greatest political obsession are quietly destroying each other.

title: Applied Digital signs $7.5 billion AI data center lease with US hyperscaler
description: Applied Digital has signed a long-term lease worth $7.5 billion with an unnamed U.S.-based hyperscaler at its ​new Delta Forge 1 site, it said on Thursday, ‌strengthening its position as a data center provider for artificial intelligence workloads.
content:
Shares of the company jumped more than 12% in early trading following the announcement.

title: Rishi Sunak warns AI is making it harder for young people to land jobs in law, finance
description: Artificial intelligence is beginning to reshape hiring patterns in sectors like law and accountancy, making it harder for young job seekers to find opportunities, former UK prime minister Rishi Sunak has said.

description: With the rapid expansion of the digital ecosystem and rising cyber threats, experts have called for creating a digital identity for every device and strengthening artificial intelligence (AI)-led cybersecurity systems to protect citizens and critical infrastructure.
